positive: Minimalist illustration of a stylized crescent moon embracing a gentle, blooming bouquet of abstract flora (e.g., geometric lotuses, starry wisps). The style is modern retro boho, using clean vector lines and negative space. Composition is centered, suitable for a circular repeat pattern. Palette: deep indigo, burnt orange, soft cream, and muted sage green. Strong contrast and clean silhouettes are essential. Flat graphic design aesthetic, high detail, suitable for t-shirt print.
